---
title: Toolbar
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/layout/toolbar/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5k0nFADmcJXQBGpU+bNQp0owBJvOXPoO65AFQY65AOyP2AF8g5BDnElYoUSgAczgGFzhLZBE4AAk4GiMNThAqCMQUSDhrOBMYMgAVKN88ADVs0jggA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.toolbar
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar.html
    signature: ui.toolbar(*args, align="right", gap=None, width=None)
  - title: ui.toolbar_input_button
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_button.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_input_button(id, label, *, icon=None, show_label=MISSING, tooltip=MISSING, disabled=False, border=False, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.toolbar_input_select
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_input_select.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_input_select(id, label, choices, *, selected=None, icon=None, show_label=False, tooltip=MISSING, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.toolbar_divider
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_divider.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_divider(width=None, gap=None)
  - title: ui.toolbar_spacer
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.toolbar_spacer.html
    signature: ui.toolbar_spacer()
- id: variations
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/toolbar/
  contents:
  - title: Toolbar with spacer
    description: Use toolbar_spacer() to push elements to opposite ends of the toolbar.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-preview.py
      height: 250
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5k0nFADmcJXQBGpU+bNQp0owBJvOXPoO65AFQY65AOyP2AF8g5BDnElYoUSgAczgGFzhLZBE4AAk4GiMNThAqCMQUSDhrOBMYMgAVKN88ADVs0jggA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-with-spacer-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
  - title: Left-aligned toolbar
    description: Set align="left" to position the toolbar on the left side of the header.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-left-aligned-preview.py
      height: 250
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-left-aligned-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5k0nFADmcJXQBGpU+bNQp0owBJvOXPoO65AFQY65AOyP2AF8g5BDnElYoUSgAczgGFzhLZBE4AAk4GiMNThAqCMQUSDhrOBMYMgAVKN88ADVs0jggA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-left-aligned-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
  - title: Toolbar in input label
    description: Use toolbar as the label for input_text_area() or input_numeric() to add formatting or action buttons directly in the input label.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-input-label-preview.py
      height: 350
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-input-label-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5k0nFADmcJXQBGpU+bNQp0owBJvOXPoO65AFQY65AOyP2AF8g5BDnElYoUSgAczgGFzhLZBE4AAk4GiMNThAqCMQUSDhrOBMYMgAVKN88ADVs0jggA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-input-label-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
  - title: Toolbar in submit textarea
    description: Add a toolbar parameter to input_submit_textarea() to include action buttons and selects in the textarea's submit area.
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-preview.py
      height: 300
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWQBXTgB0IGjOgD6q5AF5k0nFADmcJXQBGpU+bNQp0owBJvOXPoO65AFQY65AOyP2AF8g5BDnElYoUSgAczgGFzhLZBE4AAk4GiMNThAqCMQUSDhrOBMYMgAVKN88ADVs0jggA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-submit-textarea-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A toolbar is a container for buttons, select inputs, and other UI elements in a compact form suitable for card headers, footers, and constrained spaces.

To add a toolbar to your app:

1. Add `ui.toolbar()` to create a toolbar container, typically within `ui.card_header()` or `ui.card_footer()`.
2. Add toolbar elements inside using `ui.toolbar_input_button()`, `ui.toolbar_input_select()`, and other toolbar components.
3. Use `ui.toolbar_divider()` to add visual separators between toolbar elements.
4. Use `ui.toolbar_spacer()` to create flexible space that pushes subsequent elements to the opposite end.
5. Set the `align` parameter to `"left"` or `"right"` (default) to control toolbar alignment.

### Toolbar alignment

Toolbars support two alignment modes:

- `align="right"` (default): Toolbar elements are aligned to the right side of the container
- `align="left"`: Toolbar elements are aligned to the left side of the container

When using `align="left"`, the toolbar typically appears at the start of a card header or footer.

### Toolbar elements

Toolbars can contain:

- **Buttons**: Use `ui.toolbar_input_button()` for action buttons
- **Selects**: Use `ui.toolbar_input_select()` for dropdown selections
- **Dividers**: Use `ui.toolbar_divider()` to add visual separators
- **Spacers**: Use `ui.toolbar_spacer()` to push elements apart

### Spacing and width

Control toolbar spacing with the `gap` parameter, which sets the spacing between elements. The default is no gap (`0`).

Set `width="100%"` to make the toolbar expand to fill available space. This is required for `ui.toolbar_spacer()` to work effectively and is automatically set when the toolbar is a direct child of a label element.

### Toolbar in card headers

Toolbars are commonly used in card headers to provide contextual actions:

```python
ui.card(
    ui.card_header(
        "Card Title",
        ui.toolbar(
            ui.toolbar_input_button(id="action", label="Action"),
            align="right"
        )
    ),
    ui.card_body("Card content")
)
```

The toolbar appears alongside the card title, providing a clean and organized interface for card-level actions.

### Accessibility

All toolbar inputs support full keyboard navigation and screen reader accessibility. Always provide meaningful labels for toolbar buttons and selects, even when using icon-only displays.

See Also: [Toolbar Button](../../inputs/toolbar-button/index.qmd) | [Toolbar Select](../../inputs/toolbar-select/index.qmd) | [Card](../cards/index.qmd)

## Variations

:::{#variations}
:::
